title: Dangling symlink ancestor bypass in new realpath write containment helper
attacker_controlled_source: MCP client path for write_file/copy_file/restore_file targeting an allowed writable path whose existing ancestor is a dangling symlink or junction
broken_control: allowMissingLeaf branch treated realpath ENOENT as a missing destination and walked to an inside ancestor without first rejecting an existing dangling symlink component
impact: On platforms that follow dangling symlinks during file creation, a write sink could escape composeProjectDir despite the new realpath control
closest_control: Lexical resolveProjectPath and realpath containment existed, but ENOENT handling was incomplete before the fix
